'''rosavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:azelaic|azelaic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:azelaic|azelaic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rosavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || rosavithi || rosaviji || rosavishi || rosaviki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || rosavuthu || rosavuju || rosavushu || rosavuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || rosavuthu || rosavuju || rosavushu || rosavuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || rosavufthuf || rosavufjuf || rosavufshuf || rosavufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || rosavethe || rosaveje || rosaveshe || rosaveke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rosavotho || rosavojo || rosavosho || rosavoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || rosavotho || rosavojo || rosavosho || rosavoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rosavofthof || rosavofjof || rosavofshof || rosavofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || rosavïfthïf || rosavïfjïf || rosavïfshïf || rosavïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || rosavïfthïf || rosavïfjïf || rosavïfshïf || rosavïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || rosavïfthïf || rosavïfjïf || rosavïfshïf || rosavïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || rosavïfthïf || rosavïfjïf || rosavïfshïf || rosavïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || rosavæthæ || rosavæjæ || rosavæshæ || rosavækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || rosavatha || rosavaja || rosavasha || rosavaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || rosavatha || rosavaja || rosavasha || rosavaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || rosavafthaf || rosavafjaf || rosavafshaf || rosavafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || rosavasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || rosavshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || rosavroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || rosavmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || rosavyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gorosavnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gorosavnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gorosavnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gorosavnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || rosasavasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || rosasavshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || rosasavroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || rosasavmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || rosasavyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gorosasavnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gorosasavnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gorosasavnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gorosasavnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || resævasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || resævshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || resævroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || resævmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || resævyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goresævnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goresævnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goresævnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goresævnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || rosfavasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || rosfavshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || rosfavroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || rosfavmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || rosfavyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gorosfavnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gorosfavnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gorosfavnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gorosfavnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
